zh: 他點頭表示贊同。
我深信寫日記的價值。
就交通安全而言，台北大部分駕駛員應該再受教育。
假如當時受到鼓勵和幫助，他就不會失敗了。
強大的國防是和平與自由最確切的保證。
運動對健康有益。
我的腳踏車，上禮拜被偷了。
大多數的學生，都不曉得如何使用圖書館。
我在今天的報紙上，看到一則很有趣的新聞。
要學好英文，必須下功夫。
en: He indicated approval with a nod.
I am convinced of the value of keeping a diary.
As far as traffic safety is concerned, most drivers in Taipei should be reeducated.
Given encouragement and help, he would not have failed.
A strong national defense is the most certain guarantee of peace and freedom.
Exercise is good for one's health.
My bicycle was stolen last Sunday.
Most students do not know how to use a library.
I read an interesting piece of news in today's newspaper.
If you want to learn English well, you have to work hard.

zh: 這一篇文章值得仔細閱讀。
中國字很難寫嗎？
那一位戴黃帽子的外國人是誰？
天氣一天比一天熱起來了。
我不是告訴過你，我到車站的時候他們已經走了嗎？
en: This article is worth reading carefully.
Is it very hard to write Chinese characters?
Who is the foreigner that is wearing a yellow hat?
It is getting hotter day by day.
Haven't I told you that they had already gone when I got to the station?

zh: 今天早晨有一位穿綠色制服的人，把信件送到我們的社區來。
無論是晴天或下雨，天天都可以看到他。
如果有掛號信要送給我們，他就會在門口按一下鈴。
他認識我們附近的每一個人，而我們每一個人也都認識他。
有時候我在上學的途中遇到他，他就以微笑跟我打招呼。
en: Every morning a man in a green uniform delivers mail to our community.
Rain or shine, we can see him every day.
Whenever he has registered letters for us, he will ring the doorbell.
He knows everyone in our neighborhood, and everyone of us also knows him.
Sometimes I meet him on my way to school, and he greets me with a smile.

zh: 很多學生都不太注意讀書的方法，以至於浪費許多寶貴的時間。
他們讀英文讀了好幾年，還是看不懂相當容易的文章。
其實，只要方法正確，英文的閱讀能力並不難培養。
在老師還沒有講解課文之前，一定要自己先讀兩三遍。
不要讀太難的文章，也不要遇到生字就立刻查字典。
en: Many students pay so little attention to reading skills that they waste a lot of precious time.
They have studied English for many years, but they still cannot understand articles which are rather easy.
In fact, as long as the method is correct, English reading ability is not difficult to develop.
Before your teacher explains the text to you, you must go over it two or three times.
Don't read articles which are too difficult for you and don't look up a new word in a dictionary the moment you see it, either.

zh: 英語是一種重要的語言，所以很多人都在學習。
許多中國學生認為學習說英語很難。
但是只要經常練習，任何困難都可以克服。
會背課本上的對話，並不表示會說英語。
最重要的是，要能用英語說自己想說的話。
en: English is an important language, so many people are learning it.
Many Chinese students think that it is very hard to learn to speak English.
But if you keep practicing speaking English, you can overcome any difficulty.
Memorizing the dialogues in the text does not mean that you are able to speak English.
The most important thing is that you should be able to say whatever you want to say in English.

zh: 讀小學的時候，我身體很虛弱，並且常感冒。
自從上了國中以後，我就儘量找機會運動。
雖然功課一直很繁重，我還是每天慢跑半小時。
六年繼續不斷的鍛鍊使我不但更加強壯，而且也長得更高。
現在大家都說他們無法相信我從前又矮又瘦。
en: When I was in elementary school, I was very weak and often caught colds.
Ever since I entered junior high school, I have been trying hard to find opportunities for exercise.
Although my schoolwork has been heavy, I have managed to jog for half an hour every day.
Six years of constant training has made me not only stronger but also taller.
Now everyone says that they cannot believe that I was short and thin before.

zh: 昨天早上我出門的時候，天氣相當暖和。
所以我沒有穿毛衣，只穿了一件襯衫。
但是到了下午，溫度卻急速下降了。
雖然晚上比往常早回家，我還是覺得有點不舒服。
今天我不但打噴嚏而且頭痛，我想我最好馬上去看醫生。
en: It was quite warm when I left home yesterday morning.
Therefore, I didn't wear a sweater but only a shirt.
But the temperature dropped sharply in the afternoon.
Though I got back home earlier than usual in the evening, I still felt slightly under the weather.
Not only am I sneezing today, but I also have a headache. I think I had better see a doctor right away.

zh: 我生長在鄉下的一個小村落。
那時，我家附近有一條清澈的小溪。
我夏天常到那裡游泳、釣魚。
現在溪水髒得連魚都不能活。
我不知道甚麼時候才能再見到童年的美景。
en: I grew up in a small village in the country.
At that time, there was a clear brook near the house where I lived.
I used to go swimming and fishing there in the summer.
Now the water in the brook has become so filthy that fish cannot live in it.
I have no idea when I'll be able to see that beautiful view I remember from my childhood.

zh: 老實說，一直到昨天我才知道他已經去美國了。
首先，我要說明清楚，我並不反對你的意見。
en: To tell the truth, not until yesterday did I know he had gone to the United States.
To begin with, I want to make it clear that I don't disagree with your opinion.

zh: 這個月，我的運氣真是好得我都不敢相信。
月初，我的數學月考考了九十分。
月中，父親送我一部電腦當生日禮物。
前幾天，英語演講比賽我得了第二名。
這輩子，我的運氣從來沒有這麼好過。
en: This month I have been so lucky that I can hardly believe it. (My luck has been so good this month that I can hardly believe it.)
Early this month, I received a score of 90 on the monthly math exam. (Early this month, I scored 90 on the monthly math exam.)
In the middle of the month, Father gave me a computer as my birthday gift.
A few days ago, I was placed second in the English speech contest. (A few days ago, I won second place in the English speech contest.)
I have never been so lucky in my life.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 我弟弟過去經常整日虛混，一件有意義的事也不做。
現在，他努力用功，並且對未來有明確的計劃。
是什麼使得他在行為和態度上有這樣明顯的改變呢？
是他的高中老師發現了他的潛力，並且不斷地鼓勵他。
弟弟說他會永遠記得並感謝這位老師。
en: My brother used to fool around all day long, not doing anything meaningful.
Now, he is studying very hard; besides, he has a clear plan for the future.
What changed him so obviously in his behavior and attitude?
It was his high school teacher that/who discovered his potential and kept encouraging him.
My younger brother says that he will forever remember and be grateful to his teacher.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 台灣的生活最近十年變了很多。
年輕的一代有許多新的生活方式。
和他們父母親那一輩相當不同。
舉個例，很多年輕人喜歡吃美式速食，喝加糖飲料。
而老一輩的大多寧可吃中國菜，喝中國茶。
en: Life in Taiwan has changed quite a lot over the past ten years.
The younger generation has many new ways of living.
Young people are quite different from their parents.
For example, many young people like to eat American fast food and consume sweet drinks.
However, the older generation would rather eat Chinese food and drink tea.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 每次放假，我都會到台灣某個地方去旅行。
今年春假，我和一些同學搭巴士到墾丁國家公園。
我們在那兒待了三天，很欣賞那裡的山林和海岸。
這學期還沒結束，可是我們就在計畫夏天的旅行了。
我們大概會到台灣東部去，因為那兒風景很美。
en: Whenever we have a vacation, I'll travel somewhere in Taiwan.
This spring vacation, I went with some of my classmates by bus to Kenting National Park.
We stayed there for three days, appreciating the mountain forests and sea.
This semester is not over yet, but we are planning for our summer vacation travels.
We'll probably go to the east of Taiwan for the scenery there is very beautiful.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 我們即將進入二十一世紀。
那時，人們會活得更長久。
那的確是個好消息。
但是會有一個問題：
更多的老人必須由更少的年輕人奉養。
en: We are going into the 21st century.
Then, people will live longer.
That is nice indeed.
But there exists a problem:
There will be more senior citizens to be supported by fewer young people.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 以前，我常常到書店去，
主要是隨便看看一些書。
有時會買一些小說來讀。
現在因為忙著準備考試，
再也沒時間去找小說了。
en: I used to go to the bookstore,
mainly to read some books casually.
Sometimes I would buy a few novels to read.
Now as I am busy preparing for the examination,
I can spare no more time to look for some books to read.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 年輕人和老年人的睡眠習慣很不相同。
許多年輕人往往很晚還不睡，第二天早上就不能早起。
老年人通常晚上沒事做，所以很早上床。
這兩種不同的睡眠習慣，哪一種比較有益健康呢？
其實，只要睡飽，早睡晚睡都沒關係。
en: Young people's sleeping habit is very different from that of old people.
Many young people often stay up so late that they can't get up early the next morning.
Old people usually have nothing to do, so they go to bed early.
Of these two different habits, which is better for health?
In fact, as long as you get enough sleep, it doesn't matter whether you go to bed early or not.

label: 大學聯考
zh: 不關心注意是中止對話的最快速方法之一。
而是真的聽懂了。
他如何在上學途中被狗咬了。
因為他很餓，所以考試考得不好。
聽起來你今天很倒楣。
en: Not paying attention is one of the fastest ways to stop a conversation.
but you really understand.
how he was bitten by a dog on his way to school.
He didn't do well in a test because he was hungry.
Sounds like you really had a bad day. (It sounds like today wasn't your day.) (You seem to have had a really bad day.)

label: 大學聯考
zh: 昨天晚上我感覺有點不舒服。
我的媽媽要我去看中醫師。
她說中葯比西葯自然。
我生病的時候通常都會去看西醫。
但是現在我想我有另外的選擇了。
en: I didn't feel quite well last night.
My mother wanted me to go to the Chinese herbalist.
She said that Chinese medicine is more natural than Western medicine.
When I am ill, I usually go to a Western medical doctor.
But now I guess I have another choice.

label: 學測
zh: 對於什麼是最佳的渡假方式，大家都有不同的看法。
有些人喜歡到寧靜的森林中去，在那兒他們可以暫時遠離人群。
有些人卻寧願到大都市去，因為他們可以參觀博物館或購物。
還有一些人喜歡到海邊去，讓海浪沖走他們的煩惱。
有少數人則決定留在家裡，做一些像打掃屋子之類的事。
en: Everyone has different opinions about what the best way to spend a vacation is.
Some people like to go to peaceful forests, where they can get away from the crowds temporarily.
Others, however, prefer to go to big cities because they can visit museums or go shopping.
Still others like to go to the beach to let the waves wash away their troubles.
A few people, on the other hand, decide to stay at home and do things like cleaning the house.

label: 學測
zh: 昨天在回家的路上，我看到一個小女孩在路邊哭泣。
我趕緊跑過去，問她到底發生了什麼事。
小女孩說她按了好幾次門鈴，卻沒有人來開門。
看到她哭得那麼傷心，我就陪她等媽媽回來。
雖然晚了半個鐘頭才回到家，我覺得我做了一件有意義的事。
en: On my way home yesterday, I saw a little girl crying by the roadside.
I hurried over to her and asked her what on earth had happened.
The little girl said that she had rung the doorbell several times, but nobody came to open the door.
Seeing her crying so bitterly, I stayed with her and waited for her mother to come back.
Although I got home half an hour late, I felt that I had done something meaningful.

label: 學測
zh: 有沒有想過未來的旅館會是什麼樣子?
每個房間附有一部收音機，一台電視機和一個鬧鐘。
此外，所有房間都有空調。
廁所及洗衣設施位於旅館的共同區域。
信不信由你，這家旅館幾乎經常是客滿
en: Have you ever wondered what the hotels of the future will look like?
Each room comes with a radio, a television, and an alarm clock.
In addition, all the rooms are air-conditioned.
The restrooms and laundry facilities are located in the common areas of the hotel.
Believe it or not, this hotel is almost always fully booked,

label: 學測
zh: 都會地區的高房價對社會產生了嚴重的影響。
政府正推出新的政策，以滿足人們的住房需求。
en: High housing prices in urban areas have had a serious impact on society.
The government is introducing new policies to meet people's housing needs.

label: 指考
zh: 對現今的許多學生而言，在課業與課外活動間取得平衡是一大挑戰。
有效的時間管理是每位有責任感的學生必須學習的首要課題。
en: For many students today, balancing academics and extracurricular activities/striking a balance between academic and extracurricular activities is a major challenge.
Effective time management is the primary skill that every responsible student must learn.

label: 學測
zh: 相較於他們父母的世代，現今年輕人享受較多的自由和繁榮。
但是在這個快速改變的世界中，他們必須學習如何有效地因應新的挑戰。
en: Compared to their parents' generation, young people today enjoy more freedom and prosperity.
However, in this rapidly changing world, they must learn how to effectively cope with new challenges.

label: 指考
zh: 蚊子一旦叮咬過某些傳染病的患者，就可能將病毒傳給其他人。
它們在人類中快速散播疾病，造成的死亡遠超乎我們所能想像。
en: Once mosquitoes bite patients with certain infectious diseases, they can potentially transmit the virus to others.
They spread diseases rapidly among humans, causing more deaths than we can imagine.

label: 學測
zh: 近年來，有越來越多超級颱風，通常造成嚴重災害。
颱風來襲時，我們應準備足夠的食物，並待在室內，若有必要，應迅速移動至安全的地方。
en: In recent years, there have been an increasing number of super typhoons, which usually cause severe damage.
When a typhoon strikes, we should prepare enough food, stay indoors, and if necessary, quickly move to a safe place.

label: 指考
zh: 快速時尚以速度與低價為特色，讓人們可以用負擔得起的價格買到流行的服飾。
然而，它所鼓勵的「快速消費」卻製造了大量的廢棄物，造成巨大的污染問題。
en: Fast fashion is characterized by speed and low prices, allowing people to buy trendy clothes at affordable prices.
However, the "rapid consumption" it encourages creates a large amount of waste, causing significant pollution problems.

label: 學測
zh: 自2007年營運以來，高鐵（the High Speed Rail）已成為臺灣最便利、最快速的交通工具之一。
對於強調職場效率的人而言，高鐵當然是商務旅行的首選。
en: Since its operation in 2007, the High Speed Rail has become one of the most convenient and fastest means of transportation in Taiwan.
For those who emphasize workplace efficiency, the High Speed Rail is certainly the first choice for business travel.

label: 指考
zh: 創意布條最近在夜市成了有效的廣告工具，也刺激了買氣的成長。
其中有些看似無意義，但卻相當引人注目，且常能帶給人們會心的一笑。
en: Creative banners have recently become effective advertising tools in night markets, stimulating growth in sales.
Some of these seem meaningless, but they are quite eye-catching and often bring a knowing smile to people's faces.

label: 學測
zh: 我們有時會違背自己的意願去做某些事情，就只為了要取悅朋友。
其實，在面對同儕壓力的時候，我們應該學習堅持自己的原則。
en: We sometimes do things against our will just to please our friends.
In fact, when facing peer pressure, we should learn to stick to our principles.

label: 指考
zh: 早期的博物館只開放給中上階層，而且參觀者必須事先申請進入許可。
現今多數人可以親自或透過線上導覽，享受探索文化珍寶的樂趣。
en: Early museums were only open to the upper and middle classes, and visitors had to apply for entry permits in advance.
Nowadays, most people can enjoy exploring cultural treasures either in person or through online guided tours.

label: 指考補考
zh: 學習不再侷限於學校內的正規教育，非正式學習已開始扮演重要的角色。
例如，志工服務讓學生學到如何與不同背景及不同年齡層的人互動。
en: Learning is no longer confined to formal education in schools; informal learning has begun to play an important role.
For example, volunteer service allows students to learn how to interact with people from different backgrounds and age groups.

label: 學測
zh: 根據新聞報導，每年全球有超過百萬人在道路事故中喪失性命。
因此，交通法規必須嚴格執行，以確保所有用路人的安全。
en: According to news reports, over a million people lose their lives in road accidents globally each year.
Therefore, traffic regulations must be strictly enforced to ensure the safety of all road users.

label: 指考
zh: 很多人好奇今年年初在美國破紀錄的低溫是否與全球暖化有關。
不論答案為何，氣候專家預告這種不正常的天氣將會變成新的常態。
en: Many people are curious about whether the record-breaking low temperatures in the United States at the beginning of this year are related to global warming.
Regardless of the answer, climate experts predict that this kind of abnormal weather will become the new normal.

label: 試辦考試
zh: 很多人害怕公開演講，常在上台之前發抖、覺得頭昏。
只要我們對自己有信心，並持續練習，就可以克服怯場的問題。
en: Many people are afraid of/are scared of/are fearful of public speaking, often trembling/shivering and feeling dizzy before going/getting on stage.
As long as we have confidence/faith/we are confident in ourselves and keep (on)/continue practicing, we can overcome/conquer/beat the problem of stage fright.

label: 新型學測
zh: 飼養寵物並非一項短暫的人生體驗，而是一個對動物的終生承諾。
在享受寵物所帶來的歡樂時，我們不該忽略要善盡照顧他們的責任。
en: Keeping/Raising a pet/pets is not a short-term/temporary life experience, but a lifelong commitment/promise to an animal/animals.
When we enjoy/When enjoying/While enjoying the joy/fun/pleasure they/pets bring (to) us, we should not ignore/neglect/overlook the responsibility of/to taking/take good care of them.

label: 新型學測
zh: 歷史一再證明，戰爭會造成極為可怕的災難。
避免衝突、確保世界和平應該是所有人類追求的目標。
en: History proves/has proven/proved time and again that wars will/would cause extremely terrible/horrible disasters.
To avoid/Avoiding conflicts and ensure/ensuring world peace should be the goal pursued by all human beings.

label: 新型學測
zh: 每逢選舉季節，總會看到政治人物造訪各地著名廟宇。
除了祈求好的選舉結果，他們也希望展現對在地文化與習俗的尊重。
en: Every/During election season, politicians can/will be seen visiting famous temples in different places/areas.
Besides/Aside from/Apart from praying for good luck/election results, they also hope to show respect to local culture and customs.

label: 新型學測
zh: 人類的想像和創意是科技進步最大的驅動力。
過去在科幻電影中出現的神奇物件，現在正逐一成真。
en: Human's/Human/Mankind's imagination and creativity is the biggest/strongest driving force/power for technological advancement/advances/advance.
Amazing/Fantastic things/objects that appeared in science-fiction/sci-fi movies in the past are now becoming reality/real one by one.

label: 新型學測
zh: 現在越來越多高中英文老師已經增加在課堂上使用英文的百分比。
他們將學生依英語能力分成不同組別，進行多樣的聽、說活動。
en: {Now/Nowadays,} more and more senior high school English teachers have increased the percentage of {English use/using English} in class.
They divide students into different groups based on their English {ability/proficiency} and conduct {various/diverse/a variety of} listening and speaking activities.
